stemHtml: Aircraft A and B are flying to Paris. Aircraft A takes off from London Heathrow and is in front of Aircraft B with 1 minute difference. Aircraft B takes off from London City Airport at the same direction, 150 (°M) inbound Paris Charles de Gaulle VOR for holding procedure before landing. What will be the appropriate flight level for each aircraft?

options.a: Aircraft A: FL240; and Aircraft B: FL260.
options.b: Aircraft A: FL250; and Aircraft B: FL270.
options.c: Aircraft A: FL260; and Aircraft B: FL240.
options.d: Aircraft A: FL270; and Aircraft B: FL250.
